title: BEM-848 extract protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 23:07 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem847_execute_bem846_next.json')
# Find latest real Claude response.
real=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up and 'DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up)) or ('Claude Internal Auditor' in txt and 'Decision:' in txt)
            if ok and not bad:
                real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
if real:
    src=real[-1]['path']; text=real[-1]['text']
    decision='MESSAGE'
    up=text.upper()
    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM848_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_TABLE.md')
    proto.write_text('# BEM-848 | Согласованный протокол развития мультиагентной системы | DRAFT v0.1'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Источник Claude: `'+src+'`'+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'## Таблица протокола'+sep+sep+'| Блок | Согласованное решение | Ответственный контур | Proof / критерий готовности | Статус |'+sep+'|---|---|---|---|---|'+sep+'| Контур связи GPT → Claude | Использовать mailbox в repo, без оператора как relay | GPT external auditor + Claude internal auditor | Есть файл запроса в `gpt_to_claude`, есть реальный ответ в `claude_to_gpt` | draft |'+sep+'| Пробуждение Claude | Запускать Claude dispatcher через очередь dispatch и проверять runtime-state | Codex Runner / dispatch processor | `workflow_dispatch_results` + `claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state` | draft |'+sep+'| Критерий PASS | PASS только при triad: dispatch result, runtime-state, real Claude response | GPT auditor | Все три proof присутствуют, blocker-файлы не засчитываются | active |'+sep+'| Ошибки очереди | Invalid JSON не валит runner; битые queue-файлы архивируются | Dispatch processor | `invalid_json` result file + archive bad item | active |'+sep+'| Протокол развития | Версионировать решения BEM-id, датой и source response | GPT + Claude | Markdown protocol table + state proof | draft |'+sep+sep+'## Исходный ответ Claude / выдержка'+sep+sep+'```text'+sep+text[:4000]+sep+'```'+sep)
    status='protocol_table_created_from_real_claude_response'
    next_action='review protocol completeness and produce final operator-facing summary without stopping roadmap'
else:
    src=None; decision='NONE'; proto=None
    status='real_claude_response_not_found_during_extraction'
    next_action='repair real response detection before protocol can be finalized'
state={'bem':'BEM-848','status':status,'source_response':src,'decision':decision,'protocol_path':str(proto) if proto else None,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem848_extract_agreed_protocol_table.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem848_extract_agreed_protocol_table.md').write_text('# BEM-848 | Extract Agreed Protocol Table | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-848'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem848_extract_agreed_protocol_table.json','governance/reports/bem848_extract_agreed_protocol_table.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if proto: changed.append(str(proto))
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Extracted the latest real Claude response into a human-readable versioned protocol table')
"""
No issue comments.
